professional_service.name: Professional Service
professional_service.short_desc: Professional solutions for business growth with measurable strategies and real results.
professional_service.full_desc: Website landing page for professional services focused on real work results, business challenge transformation, and dedication to partner satisfaction.

umkm_store.name: UMKM Store
umkm_store.short_desc: Modern e-commerce platform to support local SME products.
umkm_store.full_desc: E-commerce website designed to help local SMEs market their products online. Equipped with an attractive product catalog, category system, and WhatsApp integration for easy transactions.

vayana.name: Vayana
vayana.short_desc: Premium website for luxury hotels and resorts with elegant minimalist design.
vayana.full_desc: Premium landing page for Vayana Hotel & Resort displaying luxury rooms, exclusive facilities, and world-class stay experiences. Design uses a luxury minimalist approach with a focus on high-quality visuals.

aura_visuals.name: Aura Visuals
aura_visuals.short_desc: Professional company profile website for photography services
aura_visuals.full_desc: Modern company profile website for Aura Visuals displaying photography services, portfolio, and price lists. Elegant design with monochrome and gold nuances, equipped with smooth animations.

fashion_store.name: E-Commerce Fashion Store
fashion_store.short_desc: Modern e-commerce platform for fashion stores with integrated payment systems
fashion_store.full_desc: Complete e-commerce website with shopping cart features, checkout, payment gateway, and admin dashboard to manage products and orders. Modern and responsive design with high performance.

tech_startup.name: Company Profile Tech Startup
tech_startup.short_desc: Professional company profile website with modern animations and interactive content
tech_startup.full_desc: Company profile website displaying company information, services, portfolio, and team with a clean and professional design. Equipped with a contact form and social media integration.

saas_product.name: Landing Page SaaS Product
saas_product.short_desc: High conversion landing page for SaaS products with strong CTA
saas_product.full_desc: Landing page specifically designed to increase conversion with persuasive copywriting, attractive design, and clear call-to-action. Equipped with analytics tracking.

restaurant.name: Restaurant Menu & Ordering
restaurant.short_desc: Online ordering system for restaurants with interactive digital menu
restaurant.full_desc: Online food ordering platform with interactive digital menu, cart system, and WhatsApp integration for order confirmation. Appetizing and user-friendly design.

photographer.name: Portfolio Photographer
photographer.short_desc: Portfolio website for photographers with stunning photo gallery
photographer.full_desc: Portfolio website displaying photography work with beautiful gallery, lightbox for viewing, and organized categories. Minimalist design that highlights photography work.

edu_platform.name: Educational Platform
edu_platform.short_desc: Online learning platform with video courses and interactive quizzes
edu_platform.full_desc: Complete e-learning platform with course management system, video player, interactive quizzes, progress tracking, and digital certificates. Supports various learning content formats.

ai_chatbot.name: Smart AI Chatbot
ai_chatbot.short_desc: Smart AI-based virtual assistant for automated customer service
ai_chatbot.full_desc: Smart chatbot application that uses AI technology to respond to user questions naturally and in real-time. Suitable for 24-hour customer service with easy integration into various platforms.

handara.name: Handara Golf & Resort Bali
handara.short_desc: Official website for luxury resort in Bali with beautiful golf views
handara.full_desc: Premium company profile website for Handara Golf & Resort Bali. Displays the beauty of the resort, golf services, lodging facilities, and booking information with elegant design and memoriable visuals.

chatbot.initial_message: Hello! 👋 I'm RoboBot, WebKuu's virtual assistant. Is there anything I can help you with regarding our Custom Website services?
chatbot.bubble_text: Can I help you with something?
chatbot.fallback_response:
Hmm, I don't fully understand your question yet. 😅

But don't worry! I can explain about:

💡 Prices & Service Packages
💡 Requestable Features
💡 Ordering Method & Work Process
💡 Technology Used
💡 Processing Time
💡 Portfolio & Sample Works
💡 Warranty & Support
💡 SEO & Mobile Optimization

Try asking one of the topics above, or contact us directly via WhatsApp for a more detailed consultation! 📱

Or use the quick question button below to start! 👇

faq.greeting:
Hello! 👋 Nice to meet you! I'm RoboBot, WebKuu's virtual assistant ready to help you.

Is there anything you want to ask about our website services? I can explain about prices, features, the creation process, or anything you need! 😊
faq.what_is:
Custom Website is a website creation service made specifically according to your needs. Not a template! 🎨

The advantages:
✨ Unique design according to your brand
✨ Features you want, not ready-made ones
✨ Modern and latest technology
✨ More flexible for development

So your website really reflects your business, not a copy-paste from someone else! 💪
faq.price:
Our service prices are very affordable and flexible! 💰

📌 Detailed Package: Starting from Rp 100,000
   → Simple landing page
   → Suitable for portfolio or promotion

📌 Custom/SME: Flexible Price
   → According to the features you need
   → 100% custom design

📌 Full Custom: Price Discussed
   → Complex system with database
   → Backend + Admin panel

The final price depends on the features you want. Let's have a free consultation first, we discuss your needs! 😊
faq.features:
You can request various features according to your needs! 🚀

✅ 100% custom design (according to your brand)
✅ Online booking/reservation system
✅ Payment gateway (accept online payments)
✅ Admin dashboard (manage content yourself)
✅ API Integration (Google Maps, social media, etc.)
✅ Complete E-commerce (online store)
✅ Multi-language
✅ SEO optimization
✅ And much more!

Have a specific feature idea? Just tell us, we'll help make it happen! 💡
faq.duration:
We work fast but maintain quality! ⚡

⏱️ Simple Landing Page: 3-5 working days
⏱️ SME Website/Company Profile: 5-7 working days
⏱️ Online Store/E-commerce: 1-2 weeks
⏱️ Complex System (Custom): 2-4 weeks

Time can be faster or slower dependent on:
• Complexity of requested features
• Feedback speed from you
• Content availability (text, images, etc.)

Ideally, we always prioritize quality! 🎯
faq.tech:
We use modern and latest technology! 💻

🔧 Frontend:
   • React.js + Tailwind CSS
   • Next.js (for maximum SEO)
   • Vue.js (if requested)

🔧 Backend:
   • Node.js + Express
   • Laravel + PHP
   • Python Django/Flask

🔧 CMS:
   • WordPress (if you prefer)
   • Custom CMS

🔧 Database:
   • MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB

You can also request a specific tech stack according to your needs! We are flexible! 😊
faq.order:
Ordering method is very easy and simple! 📝

1️⃣ Free Consultation
   → Contact us via WhatsApp/Email
   → Tell us your website needs

2️⃣ Discussion & Offer
   → We help determine the right features
   → Agree on price and timeline

3️⃣ Production
   → We start working on your website
   → Regular progress updates

4️⃣ Review & Revision
   → You check the results
   → FREE Revision until satisfied!

5️⃣ Launching! 🎉
   → Website ready online
   → Get support forever

Want to start? Contact us now! 📱
faq.packages:
We have 3 packages that can be customized! 📦

💼 Saver Package (Starting Rp 100k)
   • Landing page 1-3 pages
   • Modern & responsive design
   • Suitable for: Portfolio, product promotion

🏢 Custom/SME (Flexible Price)
   • Custom design according to brand
   • Features according to needs
   • Suitable for: Company profile, SME

🚀 Full Custom (Price Discussed)
   • Complex system + database
   • Backend & admin panel
   • Suitable for: E-commerce, booking system

Confused which to choose? Just free consultation, we help determine the most suitable! 😊
faq.guarantee:
We provide the best guarantee for you! 🌟

✅ FREE Revision until satisfied
   → No limit on revision count
   → Until you are really satisfied!

✅ Bug Fix Warranty
   → Free repair if there is an error
   → Valid forever

✅ Support Forever
   → Free consultation anytime
   → Technical assistance if there is a problem

✅ Content Update
   → We teach how to update yourself
   → Or can request to us (free!)

Your satisfaction and success is our priority! 💪
faq.contact:
Let's contact us now! 📞

📱 WhatsApp: +62 851 2295 9690
   → Chat directly with our team
   → Free consultation!

📧 Email: web.kuu@gmail.com
   → For detailed questions
   → Send your project brief

🌐 Website: You are here! 😊

⏰ Operational Hours:
   → Ready to serve 24/7 (24 hours every day)
   → Fast response!

We are ready to help you anytime! 💬
faq.portfolio:
We have worked on many various projects! 🎨

You can see our portfolio on the Portfolio page of this website. There are various types of websites we have made:

✨ Company Profile
✨ Online Store
✨ Landing Page
✨ SME Website
✨ Booking System
✨ And much more!

Each project is done with detail and according to client needs. Want to see? Click the Portfolio menu above! 👆
faq.thanks:
You're welcome! 😊🙏

Glad to be able to help you! If there are other questions, don't hesitate to ask.

If you are ready to start the project, immediately contact us via WhatsApp or email. We wait for the good news! 💙

Have a nice day! ✨
faq.responsive:
All websites we make MUST be mobile-friendly! 📱💻

✅ Responsive Design
   → Appears perfect on all devices
   → HP, tablet, laptop, desktop

✅ Fast Loading
   → Maximum speed optimization
   → Best user experience

✅ Touch-Friendly
   → Buttons and menus easy to click
   → Smooth navigation on touchscreen

In this era, 70% of visitors from mobile. So responsive design is MANDATORY! 🎯
faq.seo:
SEO is one of our main focuses! 🔍

✅ SEO-Friendly Structure
   → Clean and structured code
   → Optimal meta tags

✅ Fast Loading Speed
   → Google likes fast websites
   → We optimize maximally

✅ Mobile Optimization
   → Google prioritizes mobile-first
   → Our website definitely responsive

✅ Content Optimization
   → Correct heading structure
   → Alt text for images

✅ Sitemap & Analytics
   → Submit to Google Search Console
   → Tracking with Google Analytics

Good website but not visible on Google = useless! So we ensure your website is SEO-friendly! 📈
